# tg_cluster_service (Resource)

Manage an L4 service on a cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tg_cluster_service" "https_forwarder" {
  cluster_fqdn = "hq.example.test"
  name         = "https-forwarder"
  protocol     = "tcp"
  host         = "10.20.30.40"
  port         = 443

  source_interface       = "ens192"
  source_from_cluster_ip = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_fqdn` (String) Cluster FQDN
- `host` (String) Destination host
- `name` (String) Service name
- `port` (Number) Destination port
- `protocol` (String) Protocol

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled
- `source_from_cluster_ip` (Boolean) When true, bind the outbound socket to the cluster VIP on that NIC. Requires source_interface to be set.
- `source_interface` (String) NIC used for the upstream connection (e.g. ens192)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `service_id` (String) Service unique ID
